positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for st_pierre_bismarck_same_state_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    city_in(billings,montana)).

cnf(u30,negated_conjecture,
    ~city_in(bismarck,X0) | ~city_in(st_pierre,X0)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    city_in(missoula,montana)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    city_in(st_pierre,other_state)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    city_in(helena,montana)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    city_in(white_sulphur_springs,montana)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    same_state(X0,X1,X2) | ~city_in(X0,X2) | ~city_in(X1,X2)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~city_in(st_pierre,X0) | ~city_in(butte,X0)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~city_in(butte,other_state)).

cnf(u28,negated_conjecture,
    ~same_state(st_pierre,bismarck,X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    city_in(butte,montana)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define exception_city(X0) := $true
for all groundings,
    whenever city_in(X0,X2) & city_in(X1,X2) is false, set ~same_state(X0,X1,X2) to true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for st_pierre_bismarck_same_state_negative
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u33,negated_conjecture,
    city_in(st_pierre,sK0)).

cnf(u32,negated_conjecture,
    city_in(bismarck,sK0)).

cnf(u30,negated_conjecture,
    same_state(st_pierre,bismarck,sK0)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    city_in(helena,montana)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    city_in(white_sulphur_springs,montana)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    city_in(butte,montana)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    city_in(missoula,montana)).

cnf(u34,negated_conjecture,
    ~city_in(butte,sK0)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    ~city_in(st_pierre,X0) | ~city_in(butte,X0)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    city_in(st_pierre,other_state)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~same_state(X0,X1,X2) | city_in(X0,X2)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~same_state(X0,X1,X2) | city_in(X1,X2)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    city_in(billings,montana)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    ~city_in(butte,other_state)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define exception_city(X0) := $true
for all groundings,
    whenever city_in(X0,X2) & city_in(X1,X2) is true, set same_state(X0,X1,X2) to true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
